user.title: SolaxCloud API
user.description: Enter your SolaxCloud Developer Portal credentials. You can find these at [the Developer Portal]({developer_portal_url}) under your Application settings.

data_description.client_id: The Client ID of your SolaxCloud Developer Application.
data_description.client_secret: The Client Secret of your SolaxCloud Developer Application. Treated as a password — never shared.
data_description.evc_sn: The deviceSn of your EV Charger. Found in the SolaxCloud Developer Portal under Device → Device List.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SolaxCloud API
reauth_confirm.description: Re-authenticate Application **{client_id}**. Enter the new Client Secret from your SolaxCloud Developer Portal.

data_description.client_secret: The new Client Secret after rotation in the Developer Portal.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SolaxCloud API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Client ID and Client Secret in the Developer Portal.

abort.already_configured: SolaxCloud API is already configured. Only one instance is supported.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful. The integration has been reloaded.
